title: Inspector Feature Flags & Module Scaffold
goal: Extend config.py with all inspector feature flags and create the src/inspector.py module scaffold with clear function signatures for structural and semantic checks.

in_scope: Add feature_inspector_enabled flag (master toggle) to config
Create src/inspector.py with function stubs and docstrings
Update .env.example with all inspector flag entries

inputs: src/config.py — existing load_config() with _parse_bool helper from Week 1
PRD Week 2 section 4 — Inspector activation and all feature flags
outputs: src/config.py — updated with inspector feature flags
src/inspector.py — new module with function stubs
checklist: Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_ENABLED to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_VALIDATE_JSON to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_VALIDATE_MARKDOWN to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_VALIDATE_XML to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_REQUIRED_FIELDS to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_NO_EXTRA_TEXT to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_TONE_CHECK to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_PERSONA_CHECK to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_INSPECTOR_HIGHLIGHTING to config loading (default: false)
Create src/inspector.py with function stubs: validate_json(), validate_markdown(), validate_xml(), check_required_fields(), check_no_extra_text(), check_tone(), check_persona(), run_all_checks()
Each stub should return a structured dict with keys: check_name, status (pass/fail/error/not_evaluated), detail
Update .env.example with all nine inspector flag entries and descriptions
acceptance_criteria: load_config() returns dict with all nine inspector feature flag keys
All flags default to False when not set in environment
src/inspector.py exists and is importable without errors
Function stubs return placeholder result dicts with correct structure
Master toggle (feature_inspector_enabled) logically gates all other inspector flags
review_focus: Flag naming convention is consistent with arena flags from Week 1
Function stub signatures match the expected inputs for each check type
Result dict structure is uniform across all check types for easy UI rendering
No business logic implemented in stubs — clean separation for Parts 02-04
risks_or_notes: Nine new flags is a large addition — consider grouping in .env.example with section headers
The master toggle should be checked first in the UI to avoid unnecessary flag evaluation
Function stubs should document expected parameters clearly for implementors in Parts 02-04
definition_of_done: All nine inspector feature flags load correctly from config
src/inspector.py exists with all function stubs and docstrings
No import errors when loading the inspector module
No regression in existing config functionality
